## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX, focusing on process improvement and AI-driven content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role requires strong editorial skills and process optimization for AI-driven content pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Candidate's experience with AI content production for Adidas aligns well with GrowthX's needs](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [GrowthX uses custom-built Atlas system for content workflows, emphasizing automation and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Ideal candidate can articulate process improvements and work closely with engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview and Company Background

  - [Matthew Panzarino is Content Officer at GrowthX, previously Editor-in-Chief at TechCrunch](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [GrowthX focuses on AI-driven content creation, emphasizing process improvement and automation](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [Role requires balance of editorial skills and ability to optimize/articulate content processes](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)

### Candidate Background and Experience

  - [Jessica worked at Thread Creative for 10 years, managing high-volume copywriting for e-commerce](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Led implementation of AI content generation for Adidas, working with Hypotenuse AI](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Experience in streamlining processes, training teams on AI adoption, and managing client expectations](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)

### GrowthX's Content Production System

  - [Custom-built Atlas system houses workflows, client spaces, and content pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Moving away from AirOps to more customizable internal solutions](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Emphasis on continuous improvement and automation of repetitive tasks](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)

### Content Quality and Efficiency Goals

  - [Aiming for 98th percentile quality with minimal human intervention](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Target: Content managers should spend 5-10 minutes per piece, delivering hundreds weekly](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=2121.0)
  - [Current state: Matthew can process \~30 pieces in 3 hours; working to improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

### Process Improvement Examples

  - [Developing automated system to update content artifacts based on client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Streamlining fact-checking and tone adjustments for medical content](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Constant focus on identifying manual processes that can be automated](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marilia to reach out regarding next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=2387.0)
  - [Continue discussions on how Jessica's experience aligns with GrowthX's needs](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=2293.0)
  - [Explore potential for Jessica to contribute to process improvements and AI content optimization](https://fathom.video/share/2Rf3DdTZeEcEma6xrgcDKz_hXedFnwp_?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)
